SEARCH
Package com.hathor.hathorback.Servicios.Usuario.Hato.Repository

Interface IRepositoryHato

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Hato,UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Hato,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Hato,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Hato,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Hato,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Hato>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Hato,UUID>
@Repository public interface IRepositoryHato extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Hato,UUID>

  • Method Details

    • findByUsuario_IdUsuario

      List<Hato> findByUsuario_IdUsuario(UUID idUsuario)

    • findAllConCoordenadas

      @Query("SELECT h FROM Hato h\nWHERE h.latitud IS NOT NULL\nAND h.longitud IS NOT NULL\n") List<Hato> findAllConCoordenadas()

    • findAllFiltrado

      @Query("SELECT h FROM Hato h\nWHERE (:departamento IS NULL OR h.departamento = :departamento)\nAND (:region IS NULL OR h.ciudad = :region)\nAND (:tropico IS NULL OR h.tropico = :tropico)\nAND (:escala IS NULL OR h.escala = :escala)\nAND (:tipoHato IS NULL OR h.tipoHato = :tipoHato)\nORDER BY h.departamento ASC, h.nombreHato ASC\n") List<Hato> findAllFiltrado(@Param("departamento") String departamento, @Param("region") String region, @Param("tropico") String tropico, @Param("escala") String escala, @Param("tipoHato") String tipoHato)

    • findDepartamentosUnicos

      @Query("SELECT DISTINCT h.departamento FROM Hato h WHERE h.departamento IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.departamento ASC") List<String> findDepartamentosUnicos()

    • findCiudadesPorDepartamento

      @Query("SELECT DISTINCT h.ciudad FROM Hato h WHERE h.departamento = :departamento AND h.ciudad IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.ciudad ASC") List<String> findCiudadesPorDepartamento(@Param("departamento") String departamento)

    • findTropicosUnicos

      @Query("SELECT DISTINCT h.tropico FROM Hato h WHERE h.tropico IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.tropico ASC") List<String> findTropicosUnicos()

    • findEscalasUnicas

      @Query("SELECT DISTINCT h.escala FROM Hato h WHERE h.escala IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.escala ASC") List<String> findEscalasUnicas()

    • countHatosPorDepartamento

      @Query("SELECT h.departamento, COUNT(h)\nFROM Hato h\nWHERE h.departamento IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY h.departamento\nORDER BY COUNT(h) DESC\n") List<Object[]> countHatosPorDepartamento()

    • countHatosPorEscala

      @Query("SELECT h.escala, COUNT(h)\nFROM Hato h\nWHERE h.escala IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY h.escala\nORDER BY COUNT(h) DESC\n") List<Object[]> countHatosPorEscala()

    • countHatosPorTropico

      @Query("SELECT h.tropico, COUNT(h)\nFROM Hato h\nWHERE h.tropico IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY h.tropico\nORDER BY COUNT(h) DESC\n") List<Object[]> countHatosPorTropico()

    • findPromedioCompletitud

      @Query("SELECT AVG(h.porcentajeCompletitud) FROM Hato h") Double findPromedioCompletitud()
